title: 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info provides comprehensive information and referral for social services by phone, text, email, and on its searchable website. Callers are referred to social service and government agencies serving their area. There is also a free 211info mobile app for smartphones, available for download at the App Store and Google Play. Visit www.211info.org/mobile if you are experiencing technical difficulties or need assistance with the app. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Texting hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week; goal is to respond to all requests within 24 hours Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Main phone 211 Alternate (503) 222-5555 Toll-free (866) 698-6155 Text Short Code 898211 Text your zip code Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, email, visit website or the mobile app for more information. Voicemail is not available. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Chuukese, Hungarian, Samoan, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: 211 Systems Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
